description: Takes preprocessed images and applies thresholding, the main steps include taking the preprocessed image and applying a threshold

8ef9b0a2-b4cb-4ef6-97b3-5bd02a920419.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
8ef9b0a2-b4cb-4ef6-97b3-5bd02a920419.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

bbf34d03-c4cd-4204-a5ab-8cf1006ec63d.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
bbf34d03-c4cd-4204-a5ab-8cf1006ec63d.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
